top_signals.title: Treasury yields fall despite rate hike concerns hitting tech stocks
top_signals.summary: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — fell over 2 basis points to 4.481%.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Tesla faces federal probe after Model 3 slams into Texas home, killing 76-year-old
top_signals.summary: Harris County authorities said that the driver, Michael Butler, said that he had been using Tesla's partially automated driving systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: How Europe is grappling with extreme heat as red alerts issued in Britain, France, Spain and Italy
top_signals.summary: Several European countries issued red weather alerts as a fresh bout of extreme heat pushed temperatures beyond 40 degrees Celsius (104 degrees Fahrenheit).
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: How Citadel built an energy empire from Enron’s ashes
top_signals.summary: From the ashes of Enron, Ken Griffin built a commodities empire that extends beyond financial trading

top_signals.title: Meta's WhatsApp head to step down, will be replaced by Indian fintech founder Kunal Shah
top_signals.summary: Will Cathcart will step down as the head of WhatsApp and move into another role at the company. Kunal Shah will take over.
